'''gazhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobilissimus|nobilissimus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobilissimus|nobilissimus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzheyeth|gæzheyeth]] || [[word:gæzheyej|gæzheyej]] || [[word:gæzheyesh|gæzheyesh]] || [[word:gæzheye|gæzheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhozhoyoth|gazhozhoyoth]] || [[word:gazhozhoyoj|gazhozhoyoj]] || [[word:gazhozhoyosh|gazhozhoyosh]] || [[word:gazhozhoyo|gazhozhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhoyoth|gazhoyoth]] || [[word:gazhoyoj|gazhoyoj]] || [[word:gazhoyosh|gazhoyosh]] || [[word:gazhoyo|gazhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhofyoth|gazhofyoth]] || [[word:gazhofyoj|gazhofyoj]] || [[word:gazhofyosh|gazhofyosh]] || [[word:gazhofyof|gazhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhoyotho|gazhoyotho]] || [[word:gazhoyojo|gazhoyojo]] || [[word:gazhoyosho|gazhoyosho]] || [[word:gazhoyoko|gazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhoyoth|gazhoyoth]] || [[word:gazhoyoj|gazhoyoj]] || [[word:gazhoyosh|gazhoyosh]] || [[word:gazhoyo|gazhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhoyothol|gazhoyothol]] || [[word:gazhoyojol|gazhoyojol]] || [[word:gazhoyoshol|gazhoyoshol]] || [[word:gazhoyokol|gazhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhoyothotho|gazhoyothotho]] || [[word:gazhoyojojo|gazhoyojojo]] || [[word:gazhoyoshosho|gazhoyoshosho]] || [[word:gazhoyoko|gazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhoyothon|gazhoyothon]] || [[word:gazhoyojon|gazhoyojon]] || [[word:gazhoyoshon|gazhoyoshon]] || [[word:gazhoyokon|gazhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhoyothoro|gazhoyothoro]] || [[word:gazhoyojoro|gazhoyojoro]] || [[word:gazhoyoshoro|gazhoyoshoro]] || [[word:gazhoyokoro|gazhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
